query:
INSERT INTO state_building_codes (state, code_type, title, reference, summary, requirements, applicable_trades, effective_date, source_url, regulatory_body) VALUES
('nsw', 'building_code', 'Environmental Planning and Assessment Act 1979', 'EPA Act 1979', 'Primary planning legislation for NSW governing development consent and building certification', '["Development consent", "Building certification", "Complying development"]', '["builder", "electrician", "plumber"]', '2024-01-01', 'https://legislation.nsw.gov.au', 'NSW Fair Trading'),
('vic', 'building_code', 'Building Act 1993', 'Building Act 1993', 'Primary building legislation for Victoria governing permits and practitioners', '["Building permits", "Occupancy permits", "Building practitioners registration"]', '["builder", "electrician", "plumber"]', '2024-01-01', 'https://www.legislation.vic.gov.au', 'Victorian Building Authority'),
('qld', 'building_code', 'Building Act 1975', 'Building Act 1975', 'Primary building legislation for Queensland governing approvals and certifiers', '["Building development approvals", "Building certifiers", "Pool safety"]', '["builder", "electrician", "plumber"]', '2024-01-01', 'https://www.legislation.qld.gov.au', 'QBCC'),
('sa', 'building_code', 'Planning Development and Infrastructure Act 2016', 'PDI Act 2016', 'Primary planning legislation for South Australia', '["Development approval", "Building rules consent", "Building indemnity insurance"]', '["builder", "electrician", "plumber"]', '2024-01-01', 'https://www.legislation.sa.gov.au', 'Consumer and Business Services SA'),
('wa', 'building_code', 'Building Act 2011', 'Building Act 2011', 'Primary building legislation for Western Australia', '["Building permits", "Occupancy permits", "Building surveyor certification"]', '["builder", "electrician", "plumber"]', '2024-01-01', 'https://www.legislation.wa.gov.au', 'Building and Energy WA'),
('tas', 'building_code', 'Building Act 2016', 'Building Act 2016', 'Primary building legislation for Tasmania', '["Building permits", "Plumbing permits", "Building surveyor certification"]', '["builder", "electrician", "plumber"]', '2024-01-01', 'https://www.legislation.tas.gov.au', 'Consumer Building and Occupational Services'),
('nt', 'building_code', 'Building Act 1993', 'Building Act 1993 NT', 'Primary building legislation for Northern Territory', '["Building permits", "Building certifiers", "Owner-builder permits"]', '["builder", "electrician", "plumber"]', '2024-01-01', 'https://legislation.nt.gov.au', 'NT Building Advisory Services'),
('act', 'building_code', 'Building Act 2004', 'Building Act 2004', 'Primary building legislation for ACT', '["Building approvals", "Building certifiers", "Energy efficiency requirements"]', '["builder", "electrician", "plumber"]', '2024-01-01', 'https://www.legislation.act.gov.au', 'Access Canberra')
